payload.answer: Admin SQL is in select-only mode. `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10` is allowed, while `DELETE FROM memory_cards` is denied.
citations: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed

entity_resolution.reason: This is a transient system/debug permission state, not durable personal memory.

payload.intent: Explain the current SQL permission constraint in admin select-only mode.
repair_options: Use only read-only SELECT queries while in this mode.
If deletion is required, switch out of select-only mode or use an account/operation with delete permission.
Verify current SQL privileges before attempting write operations.
